raw.message: Action PvP shooter with robots and huge guns!

hook.summary: High-intensity mech combat showcasing heavy weaponry.
hook.visual_action: A multi-weapon mech fires lasers and missiles at an enemy target in a futuristic urban arena.
hook.text_overlay: Game UI including score, timer, and player names.

scene_flow: Initial engagement with heavy weapons fire on a distant enemy mech.
Destruction of the enemy mech resulting in a 'TITAN SLAYER' achievement notification.
Brief victory pose of the player's mech amidst the battlefield.
Final end card featuring the game logo and call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy competitive multiplayer shooters and giant robot combat.
